title: Customize info on card in Kanban view
excerpt:
Hi, 
Is it possible to customize which info that is displayed on the actual Kanban card? It would be nice to see tags, estimates, reported time… etc etc… 
/Johan

posts.author: johan.n (Johan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
Is it possible to customize which info that is displayed on the actual Kanban card? It would be nice to see tags, estimates, reported time… etc etc…
/Johan

posts.author: straister (Shelly Traister)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be great - that view is helpful for so many things, and there’s plenty of space on the items for some selectable fields.

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml: Please, Post it in Feature/Request so we can vote this.

posts.author: Stuart1745 (Stuart Rampy)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would love to have the group color add a shade to the card so I can look at everones board and see what groups they are appart of.
also to see priority ( as stars or something)
and the due date with time remaining.

I made a short mockup.

image258×511 22 KB

posts.author: bradley (Bradley Vanderhorst)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @hlopezvc @Stuart1745 @straister @johan.n!

Appreciate the feedback! Have you seen the recent improvements to Kanban, like:

See more info:

Edit the person in the card:

kanbanPersonEdit834×624 799 KB

Kanban item card height is now flexible:

image1000×472 172 KB

image1000×470 155 KB

And some others

posts.author: Stuart1745 (Stuart Rampy)
posts.cookedHtml: Yeah I love it! thank y’all for making this update.

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes @bradley it looks better and better

posts.author: ConnieMiller (ConnieMiller)
posts.cookedHtml: How do you adjust the Kanban card height?

posts.author: bradley (Bradley Vanderhorst)
posts.cookedHtml: hey @ConnieMiller (welcome to the monday.com community!) - the height of the view will adjust as you add or remove columns that you want selected.

posts.author: James_Eadie (James Eadie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @bradley, I am desperately trying to find a way to improve the way the task looks once you click on the card - in all honesty I am trying to close the gap to Jira.

Simple things like the full name of the task not being shown at the top and the standard height of the items. Is there any way to effectively ‘wrap’ the text boxes so that all data is shown without having to constantly hover over the item to see it?

image1190×652 59 KB

posts.author: YSteinberg (Yoel S)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI @bradley, My team uses Kanban Desktop and mobile heavily, and I have the following issues:
Desktop view- No option to show location field on the kanban card (weird, on mobile you could…)
Mobile view- NO OPTION TO CUSTOMIZE AT ALL WHAT FIELDS SHOW ON THE CARD. To me this is mind blowing, I am sure there is a thread with a billion votes to allow this I just haven’t found it
the mobile view just makes me pull hairs out. it shows a field for subitem when i dont use subitems, it shows the status field which is redundant since it is in the column of that status, and there is so much wasted vertical space, precious real estate on mobile. I attached a screenshot, all the blue is vertical space I would want an option to get rid of. (P.S. my general kanban view looks different than the previous posts, I assume there has been some changes in the past few years).

Untitled633×887 65.2 KB

posts.author: YSteinberg (Yoel S)
posts.cookedHtml: I just noticed that now I can put location field on desktop. I guess that’s new…

posts.author: Katalyst (Kate)
posts.cookedHtml: @Bradley - any updates on this one? We use Monday.com for our OKRs and not being able to resize the fields that display is SUCH a hinderance.
